LAB 3: SPINAL CORD AND SPINAL NERVES HUMAN ANATOMY LAB MANUAL 35

36 MALGOSIA WILK-BLASZCZAK

LAB 3: SPINAL CORD AND SPINAL NERVES MEASURABLE OUTCOMES • Correctly identify the structures which constitute comprise the spinal cord and its extensions. • Explain the differences between the meninges. • Differentiate the spinal plexuses. • Determine the origin, pathway and target organs of the spinal nerves. • Classify the structures of the spinal cord on the given histology sli
